name: Crystal Coast Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Crystal Coast Country Club in Pine Knoll Shores, NC! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Emerald Isle Community Center
description: Emerald Isle Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Emerald Isle, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Fort Benjamin Recreation Center
description: Fort Benjamin Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Newport, NC. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Morehead City Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Morehead City Recreation Center in Morehead City, NC! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms and water.
fees: Members only — All participants must have a day pass or an annual pass.

name: Rotary Park
description: Rotary Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morehead City, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Shevans Park
description: Shevans Park is a place to play pickleball in Morehead City, NC. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Sports Center
description: Come play pickleball at Sports Center in Morehead City, NC! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — No charge for members. Non-Members: 10 plays for $60, Single Session: $8
